provider_gateway.blocked_message: Direct model access is not allowed. Route Gemini traffic through the approved Blackwall shield or sidecar.

rules.message: Credentials or secret material were detected. Remove tokens, keys, or secrets and retry through an approved secure workflow.
Employee or customer identifiers were detected. Remove account or personnel identifiers and use an approved internal workflow.
Payroll or salary information was detected. This content is restricted and cannot be sent to the model.
Financial forecast or guidance content was detected. Use an approved finance workflow instead of the general assistant.
Board or directors' material was detected. This content is blocked from the general assistant.
Merger, acquisition, or due-diligence content was detected. Route this request through the approved corporate-development workflow.
Legal or privileged case material was detected. This request cannot continue in the standard assistant.
Sensitive project or codename material was detected and has been routed for review.
Financial values were detected. Confirm that you want to continue or remove the figures before retrying.
Personal information was masked before the request continued.
